overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The scene features towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, neon-lit streets with heavy purple and blue tones, and wet pavement reflecting the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial sidewalk with covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red-tiled sidewalk past the Fourth Wall building and palm trees

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large tan building with prominent blue neon 'FOURTH WALL' signage
elevated covered pedestrian walkway with glass panels running along the right side
tall palm trees lining the center divider of the street
multiple large digital billboards and holographic advertisements on building facades displaying various brands
metal safety railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic downtown street at dusk, with the camera following a character walking along a red-paved sidewalk. The Fourth Wall building dominates the left side with its bright blue neon signage, while a covered elevated walkway runs along the right. Palm trees line the street and various holographic advertisements illuminate the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with wide pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the wide intersection
character turns left at the intersection to proceed down a perpendicular street toward the distant skyscraper

agents.ego_description: crossing the broad intersection via yellow crosswalk and turning left onto a multi-lane street

entered.detail: massive futuristic corporate skyscraper with illuminated windows visible in the distance down the street
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes spanning the multi-lane road
elevated highway or monorail track structure running overhead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered sidewalk into a wide open intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk. The scene opens up to reveal a massive skyscraper towering in the distance down the street. The character turns left and proceeds under the shadow of an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown arterial with elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of surrounding skyscrapers and the Arasaka tower in the distance
character passes directly underneath the elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide street while looking up at the towering buildings and passing under the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving down the street and passing by

entered.detail: Fourth Wall building visible again on the right side from a new angle with smoke stacks visible behind it
tall cylindrical corporate skyscraper with distinctive illuminated top section
industrial smoke stacks emitting dark smoke visible between buildings against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Walking down a wide multi-lane street, the character passes beneath an elevated highway overpass. The Fourth Wall building appears again on the right, while industrial smoke stacks and the distinctive Arasaka tower dominate the distant skyline. A futuristic car drives past on the right as the camera tilts up to show the scale of the surrounding megastructures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with dense neon signage and storefronts

events.description: character crosses the final intersection and enters a narrower commercial street with dense neon lighting
environment becomes dominated by purple neon lights and holographic shop displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow commercial street passing pedestrians and illuminated shopfronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward camera in the narrow alley

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'IT'S BIG' advertisement with a beverage can image
vertical purple neon light strips running along the left side of the narrow street
storefronts with glowing signs and holographic displays including a large female face advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a final intersection and enters a narrower commercial alleyway. The 'IT'S BIG' billboard dominates the right side while intense purple neon lights line the left. The street becomes more enclosed with dense holographic advertisements and shopfronts, and more pedestrians are visible walking through the neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic downtown district that transitions from an open, neon-lit boulevard into a dense, enclosed commercial alleyway. It begins on a red-paved sidewalk beside the Fourth Wall building, moving past palm trees and holographic advertisements under the glow of blue neon signage. As the character emerges from a covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks before turning left to pass beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated highway. The camera then follows the character along a multi-lane street toward the distant Arasaka tower and industrial smoke stacks, tilting upward to capture the scale of the megastructures as a futuristic car speeds past. Finally, the perspective shifts into a narrower corridor where the environment becomes more claustrophobic, dominated by the intense purple lights of shopfronts and a massive billboard reading IT'S BIG.
